---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition to the SDK, motion engine, or sample apps
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to build that needs this? Concrete is better
     than abstract — "a tennis game needs to know swing velocity" is
     better than "the SDK should be more flexible". -->

## Suggested API or change

<!-- Optional. Pseudocode is fine. If you have a proposed AIDL diff,
     remember that breaking changes strand every published game — please
     mention compatibility plans. -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- What did you try with the current API? Why didn't it work? -->

## Willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Yes, with mentorship
- [ ] No (will provide more details in comments instead)
